query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A nighttime photograph of an empty road running beneath a multi-level concrete overpass. Large angled support pillars line the left side of the street, with a no-parking sign mounted on a pole near the nearest column. A row of overhead lights follows the ceiling of the overpass into the distance. Snow and ice line the edges of the asphalt road and sidewalk. A dark sedan is parked on the right side near an intersection visible in the background. Dark streaks and markings appear on the lower sections of the concrete supports, and a red fire hydrant stands near one of the pillars. Additional bridge structures are visible further down the corridor.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime photograph of an empty road beneath a concrete overpass bathed in a sickly yellow sodium-vapor cast that shifts every surface toward an unsettling, contaminated hue. Large angled support pillars show dark streaks, grime, and graffiti, communicating decay and degradation in the weathered urban infrastructure. Overhead lights recede into the distance along the ceiling, illuminating the corridor with harsh artificial light. Snow lines the roadside curbs where a lone dark sedan sits parked near an intersection in the background. The empty underpass and neglected concrete surfaces evoke atmospheric distress, creating a mood of unease and isolation throughout the scene.
